name: university-physics-site
description: Eleventy build of the OpenStax University Physics bundle (CNXML source rendered to HTML)

scripts.update:mathjax: rm -rf assets/js/mathjax && mkdir -p assets/js/mathjax && cp node_modules/mathjax/mml-chtml.js assets/js/mathjax/ && cp -r node_modules/mathjax/input node_modules/mathjax/output node_modules/mathjax/ui node_modules/mathjax/a11y node_modules/mathjax/sre assets/js/mathjax/
